title: ModelInfo
description: Represents the model configuration including model type, supported parameters, and other model details.

vector_type.description: Whether the embedding model produces 'dense' or 'sparse' embeddings.

default_dimension.description: The default embedding model dimension (applies to dense embedding models only).

max_sequence_length.description: The maximum tokens per sequence supported by the model.

max_batch_size.description: The maximum batch size (number of sequences) supported by the model.

provider_name.description: The name of the provider of the model.

supported_dimensions.description: The list of supported dimensions for the model (applies to dense embedding models only).

supported_parameters.description: List of parameters supported by the model.
